creator: pabelanger@gmail.com
text:
Asterisk has recently changed to location of the default .pid file from:

/var/run/asterisk.pid

to

/var/run/asterisk/asterisk.pid

With this, /usr/local/etc/rc.d/asterisk script now breaks.

Fix: 

load_rc_config $name

-pidfile=${asterisk_pidfile:-"/var/run/asterisk/asterisk.pid"}
+pidfile=${asterisk_pidfile:-"/var/run/asterisk.pid"}

 asterisk_enable=${asterisk_enable:-"NO"}--VTuTUn8XUmL286HATT0ofXTDRHQenSqEGDvDSC8Ct7RU5FEg
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -u files/asterisk.sh.in files.orig/asterisk.sh.in
--- files/asterisk.sh.in        Mon Sep  3 16:37:27 2007
+++ files.orig/asterisk.sh.in   Mon Sep  3 16:37:15 2007
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/asterisk
make install clean
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/asterisk start
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/asterisk restart
